tasks.prompt: Fix fish shell completion so that commands and options with multiline help strings are handled correctly. Currently, multiline help text causes broken or malformed fish completion scripts.

file_scopes.reason: FishComplete class handles fish shell completion generation and needs to fix multiline help string handling. Candidate context only; requires replan before write. Signals: bm25, llm, pagerank. Scope review requested promotion, but non-review signals did not justify must_write.

Changelog typically updated when fixing bugs like multiline help in fish completion. Candidate context only; requires replan before write. Signals: cochange, llm. Scope review requested a drop, but protected evidence kept it.
